title: Armor Points Begone
description: Removes "Armor points" and "Armor Toughness" from armors.
body:
This mod adds a challange to the game, by removing "Armor Points" and "Armor Toughness" from armor pieces (Even modded ones).

Note that this mod does **not** remove "abilities" that specific armor pieces have. (Like leather boots making you not fall into Powder Snow, Or gold armor making piglins not angry at you)
